dct_description_sm: This tabular data, prepared by Data You Can Use, presents the share of the employed population that drives 45 minutes or more to work by census tract in the city of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. The data is sourced from the 2012-2016 American Community Survey 5-year estimates, and utilizes 2010 Census tracts. For more information, please visit Data You Can Use.
schema_provider_s: American Geographical Society Library – UWM Libraries
